title: codonopsis obtusa
intro: Codonopsis obtusa, also known as Dongdonghua or small flowered dodder, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Codonopsis obtusa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Codonopsis obtusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
